title: Project: Vibrant Journeys
description: A mod that aims to spice up vanilla survival
body:
### Description
Project: Vibrant Journeys is an expansive world generation mod that focuses on improving vanilla biomes by adding small details to make the world feel more alive and dynamic!

### Features
- **Groundcover**: Find rocks, twigs, fallen leaves, bones, pinecones, seashells, and more as you journey across the Minecraft landscape!
- **Livelier biomes**: Tall grass variants, fallen trees, bark mushrooms, and nether flora!
-** Improved lakes**: Lakes and ponds are a lot less boring with seagrass, cattails, and lilypads!
-** Improved beaches**: Beaches are decorated with sea oats, seashells, and beach grass!
- **Better ruined Nether portals**: Ruined portals are now flavored and come in soul sand, basalt, warped, and crimson variants!
- **Mini-improvements**: cobwebs under tree leaves, tropical fish spawns in jungles, and more!

![Before / After](https://i.imgur.com/HgsxmEN.png)

Project: Vibrant Journeys is licensed under the [https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

Also available on CurseForge [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-vibrant-journeys)
